subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O my God and the God of the Nations, my Lord and the Lord of the world! Give ear unto my sighs and look upon the tears of mine eyes
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی و اله الامم و مالکی و مالک العالم فانظر الی زفراتی و تذرفات
subcodes.subjects: @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @justice and wrath of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
